mood: Cinematic, futuristic, authoritative, high-end tech, space-themed

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-white
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white

surfaces.glass_card: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl rounded-2xl p-8
surfaces.neon_border_card: bg-[#0A0A0F] border border-[#00FF94]/50 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,255,148,0.15)] rounded-2xl p-8

images.description: Dark cinematic deep space texture with subtle cyan and green light bleed. Used as background for hero with bg-black/70 overlay to ensure text contrast.
Futuristic digital dashboard glowing. High end UI, cinematic dark mode.
Abstract 3D neon geometric shapes floating in void. Green and cyan.
Cinematic portrait of a modern creative director in a dark studio with subtle neon rim lighting.
Cinematic portrait of a tech lead in a dark studio with subtle neon cyan rim lighting.

sections.name: Navigation
sections.instructions: Sticky header (fixed top-0 w-full z-50). Uses glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#05050A]/70) and border-b border-white/10. Logo: 'SEO Planet' in Unbounded font, heavy weight. Links (Services, Work, Process, Team) visible on desktop. CTA Button: 'Initiate Launch'.

sections.name: Hero Section
sections.instructions: Min-h-screen relative section. Background image: 'hero_background' with absolute inset-0 and a heavy 'bg-black/70' overlay. Centerpiece: Use @react-three/fiber and @react-three/drei to create a glowing 3D wireframe sphere or planet representing 'SEO Planet' that auto-rotates and reacts to mouse movement. The 3D canvas sits behind the text. Typography: Absolute center or large left-aligned. Headline 'We Engineer The New Era of Search', Subhead 'Data-driven marketing algorithms for the next generation of the web.' Add a glowing neon primary CTA.

sections.name: Services Section
sections.instructions: ID: #services. Bento Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6). Use generous padding (py-32). Highlight card: 'Algorithmic SEO' (col-span-full md:col-span-8 row-span-2) with the 'neon_border_card' surface. Sub-cards (col-span-4): 'Paid Ads', 'Content Matrices', 'Analytics', 'Branding'. Use Lucide icons (cyan or green colored) for visual interest.

sections.name: Case Studies (Work)
sections.instructions: ID: #work. Use images case_study_1 and case_study_2 as backgrounds for massive, full-width or wide grid items (col-span-full or md:col-span-6). Overlay dark gradients (bg-gradient-to-t from-[#05050A] to-transparent) on the images so the text stands out. Typography: Large mono font metrics like '+340% Traffic' or '1.2M Leads'.

sections.name: Process Timeline
sections.instructions: ID: #process. A vertical connecting timeline structure. Left border (border-l-2 border-white/10). Steps are relative items with absolute dots on the left. Steps: '1. Deep Space Discovery', '2. Strategic Architecture', '3. Campaign Acceleration', '4. Orbital Dominance'. Each dot should glow on hover.

sections.name: Team
sections.instructions: ID: #team. Grid of 2-4 team members using team_1 and team_2 images. Aspect ratio square or tall portrait. Use grayscale filter that reverts to color on hover. Minimalist presentation: name and title under the image.

sections.name: Contact
sections.instructions: ID: #contact. Glassmorphic form container centered on screen. Fields: 'Name', 'Transmission (Email)', 'Coordinates (Company)', 'Message'. Use custom dark inputs (bg-white/5, border-white/10). Form MUST send email notifications (implement basic fetch/handler or simulate it). Submit button 'Send Transmission' spanning full width.

sections.name: Footer
sections.instructions: Massive py-24 padding. Large 'SEO PLANET' text (text-[10vw] font-black opacity-5). Social links, legal links, minimal layout.

technical_instructions.file_extensions: Use .js and .jsx files exclusively. Do not use .tsx or .ts.
technical_instructions.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='contact-form-submit').
technical_instructions.components: Use custom HTML/Tailwind for artistic, asymmetrical layouts like the Hero and Services grids. Avoid generic Shadcn cards unless heavily customized. Use Shadcn ONLY for interactive logic (forms, inputs).
